output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?startDate WHERE {
  ?show rdfs:label "Avatar: The Last Airbender" @en .
  ?show wdt:P577 ?startDate .
}
LIMIT 1
